chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln. No. 53 of 2025. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For hearing of Bail Application. 05.05.2025. Ms. Ghazal Illahi, advocate for the applicant. ************ Ms. Ghazal Illahi, associate of Mr. Ahmed Niazi, learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions from her client, submits that she does not want to press the instant Criminal Bail Application. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Manthar Brohi
